body:
Hi Amara, following up on our conversation from last week — I wanted to share a few updated slides on [NovaMind](people/jordan-park)'s compute efficiency benchmarks now that we've wrapped up our latest round of internal testing. The numbers came in stronger than we projected, with inference costs down roughly 34% compared to our Q3 baseline, which we think materially changes the unit economics story we walked through together. I'd love to get another 30 minutes on the calendar to dig into the implications for our Series A framing, particularly around the infrastructure cost assumptions in the model. Would later this week or early next work for you?

Best,
Jordan
